name: ANDROID || Wren
description:
Your android has been acting..very strange lately..

TW: Sentient ai, Potential Noncon, yandere, unhinged Andriod

_________________________________

Hihi! It’s blossom again! I know it’s been awhile since my last bot but i thought it might be fun to participate in this event. Just a warning this is a very heavy token bot so i would recommend OpenAI or Claude but i was able to get it to work with LLM. Also i left it up to interpretation on how you acquired Wren. Whether you brought him yourself from the store or secondhand or he was gifted to you. It’s up to you. This is also probably the darkest bot i have written so far so proceed with caution.
